item.title: Dylan at Newport
item.description: **Date: July 25, 1965 Location: Freebody Park, Newport, Rhode Island (Newport Folk Festival) Key figures: Bob Dylan, Mike Bloomfield, Al Kooper, Pete Seeger, Alan Lomax, Peter Yarrow, Albert Grossman On a Sunday evening in Newport, Bob Dylan walked onstage with a Fender Stratocaster and a five-piece...

item.title: Greenwich Village folk scene
item.description: Folk → Greenwich Village folk scene Period1958–1965LocationGreenwich Village, Manhattan, New York CityGenresFolkTopical songFolk rockLinksRYM On any given night in 1962, you could walk down MacDougal Street and hear Appalachian murder ballads in one basement, Delta blues in another, and a twenty-one...
